parameters.query: SELECT message, channel, timestamp FROM conversations WHERE user_id = '{{ $json.userId }}' ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 10

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'qwen2.5:3b', stream: false, options: { temperature: 0.7, num_predict: 512 }, messages: $json.messages }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'qwen2.5:3b', stream: false, options: { temperature: 0.3, num_predict: 256 }, messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'Summarize the search results in 2-3 sentences. Be direct, no filler.' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Query: ' + $('Response Parser').first().json.toolCall.args + '\n\nResults: ' + JSON.stringify(($json.web?.results || []).slice(0, 3).map(r => ({ title: r.title, description: r.description, url: r.url }))) }] }) }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO conversations (user_id, message, channel, timestamp) VALUES ('{{ $json.userId }}', '{{ $json.userMessage.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ $json.channel }}', '{{ $json.timestamp }}'), ('{{ $json.userId }}', '{{ $json.response.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ $json.channel }}', NOW())

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ messaging_product: 'whatsapp', to: $json.userId, type: 'text', text: { body: $json.response } }) }}
